title: emblingiaceae
intro: The emblingiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. Emblingiaceae is a small family of plants that contains approximately six species of shrubs and trees, native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. These plants are typically found in high-altitude, tropical environments and are characterized by their distinctive flowers and leaves. The family Emblingiaceae is considered to be one of the least studied plant families, with many species still awaiting detailed classification and research.
